notes: Vendor Audit Suite ship 1 of 2 — RACK AUDIT WALK. In-place 'Audit Mode' layered onto the existing RACK MAP elevation (no new page, no second lookup). A '▶ START VENDOR AUDIT' button is injected into the rendered rack header (_rmRenderHeaderInArea hook). Entering decorates the .rm-slot device nodes renderElevation already produced: a cursor highlights the current device (inline outline), a docked bar (reuses rm-device-sheet chrome) shows the EXPECTED model/serial read straight from the bound dev, and PASS/FAIL/FLAG/SKIP paint a persistent status pip (green/red/gold inset border) onto that slot and advance. FLAG opens the existing blocker_quick discrepancy capture. Walk state memoized per rack in localStorage (phantom_audit_walk_v1, keyed by rackId, results keyed by uStart, slot-count staleness guard) and restored on re-entry so pips repaint after a reload; pips persist after exit so the elevation doubles as a validation dashboard. No byCab/index lookup — expected data comes from the rendered slots. Zero new CSS rules (reuses .rm-device-sheet/.pt-btn + inline styles; brace baseline 3122/3122). Metal Match ships next as v1.6.78. Three stamps at v1.6.77.
